channel.title: about on Philipp Schmalen
channel.description: Recent content in about on Philipp Schmalen

item.title: About
item.description: Diving into Job Recommender Systems and Causal Forest by Athey et al. (2019). Currently working on a tutorial on Causal Forest in R which will be published January 2020. Graduating December 2019 as MSc Economics from Copenhagen University. Excited to read your message.
